meaning: n.骑士,武士,对女人献殷勤,有礼貌的绅士
examples: The editor takes a cavalier attitude to the concept of fact checking.
Protostomia and Deuterostomia are in the classification of Cavalier-Smith.
But generally the industry adopted a rather cavalier attitude to click fraud.
True to type, Downey has a ball as the cavalier playboy in the early scenes.
Those old enough remember Walt Frazier as a Cavalier and Johnny Unitas as a Charger.
